vendor_nt36672a_trim_entry=absent

[runtime contract]
vendor_point_read=select_event_xdata_then_66_bytes
vendor_point_layout=10_records_stride_6;status_0x01_or_0x02;12_bit_xy
vendor_pressure=first_two_records_16_bit_then_width_byte;clamp_1000
vendor_transform=swap_xy_then_reverse_y
vendor_firmware_info=event_offset_0x78
vendor_project_id=event_offset_0x9a

[linux 7.1.x contract]
linux_match=novatek,nt11205-ts(chip_id_0x05);novatek,nt36672a-ts(chip_id_0x08)
linux_point_read=direct_client_address_0x00_without_vendor_xdata_select

[decision]

reuse=not_justified_by_current_evidence
reason=vendor_trim_table_and_transport_are_not_the_linux_nt36672a_contract
